zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas d'Anvers II於1295年出生在英國英格蘭爾希 萊時，他的父親William d'Anvers III45歲，母親Agnes de Legh47歲。他於大約1312年與Joan le Norreys在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1354年在英國英格蘭爾布拉德利 白 馬爾帕斯享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾萊姆。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas d'Anvers II was born in 1295, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William d'Anvers III, was 45 and his mother, Agnes de Legh, was 47. He married Joan le Norreys about 1312, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1354, in Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Lymm, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas d'Anvers II est né en 1295, à High Legh, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William d'Anvers III, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Legh, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Joan le Norreys environ 1312, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1354, à Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Lymm, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas d'Anvers II 1295 in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William d'Anvers III 45 und seine Mutter Agnes de Legh 47. Er hat um 1312 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Joan le Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1354 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lymm, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas d'Anvers II è nato il nel 1295 nel High Legh, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William d'Anvers III, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Legh, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Joan le Norreys circa 1312, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1354, nel Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Lymm, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas d'Anvers IIが1295年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグで生まれた時，父William d'Anvers IIIは45歳，母Agnes de Leghは47歳であった。約1312年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでJoan le Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1354年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラドリー ビー マルプアスで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアリンムにて埋葬された。

ko.of Bradley, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브래들리 비 맬파스
ko.Bradley, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브래들리 비 맬파스
ko.Bradley, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브래들리 비 맬파스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas d'Anvers II(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히 레그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William d'Anvers III(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Legh(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Joan le Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브래들리 비 맬파스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 림에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas d'Anvers II nasceu em 1295, em High Legh, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William d'Anvers III, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Legh, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan le Norreys aproximadamente 1312, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1354, em Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Lymm, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas d'Anvers II родился в 1295 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William d'Anvers III было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Legh, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan le Norreys около 1312 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1354 г. в местности брадли би малпас, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности лимм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas d'Anvers II nació en 1295, en High Legh, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William d'Anvers III, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnes de Legh, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Joan le Norreys aproximadamente 1312, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1354, en Bradley by Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Lymm, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
